creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The idea is to unify all downloads using Gitlab generated archives so the tree is easier to maintain. For example to easily differentiate (since Gitlab doesn't necessarily only mean gitlab.com) from static archives and fixing breakage treewide instead of having to search the tree and sort out ports by hand.

Next step will be to teach USE_GITLAB about tags just like USE_GITHUB so maintainers can make use of it next time the port is updated and also DEV warnings just like ones for USE_GITHUB.

Best regards,
Daniel
